response.justification: Strong senior full-stack engineer with 13+ years of experience and recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq. However, the resume lacks demonstrated depth in production GenAI systems, RAG architectures, vector databases, evaluation pipelines, and cloud-platform AI services — all core requirements for a Staff Forward Deployed GenAI role. Customer-facing technical leadership is also not evident. Worth a screening call to probe the recent AI-agent work, but currently appears under-qualified against the explicit GenAI/cloud bar.
strengths: 13+ years shipping production software across diverse stacks (TS/Node, Python-adjacent, DLang, C/C++)
Recent hands-on work with MCP servers and agentic workflow frameworks at re:cinq
Strong software craftsmanship background — TDD, CI/CD, mentoring, public workshops and talks
concerns: No demonstrated 8+ years building production GenAI solutions; AI exposure is recent and limited in scope
Missing evidence of RAG, vector databases, LLM evaluation/observability, or multi-agent frameworks (LangGraph/CrewAI)
Limited cloud-AI platform depth (AWS CDK mentioned, but no GCP/Azure AI services or large-scale AI infra design)

key_factors.factor: Recent MCP and agent tooling work
Senior engineering breadth and mentoring track record
